allow: PowerShell($gitUrl = "https://github.com/git-for-windows/git/releases/download/v2.43.0.windows.1/Git-2.43.0-64-bit.exe"; $gitPath = "$env:TEMP\\GitInstaller.exe"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $gitUrl -OutFile $gitPath -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Descargado, instalando..."; & $gitPath /VERYSILENT /NORESTART; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; Write-Host "Git instalado")
